provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Botswana Open University Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and functions of Botswana Open University
provisions.title: Establishment of University
provisions.content:
3. Establishment of University
(1) The Botswana College of Distance and Open Learning established under section 3 of the repealed Act, is hereby continued under the new name of the Botswana Open University and shall continue to exist as if established under this Act.
(2) The University shall be a body corporate with perpetual succession and a common seal, capable of suing and being sued in its own name and, subject to the provisions of this Act, of performing such acts as bodies corporate may by law perform.

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and functions of Botswana Open University
provisions.title: Powers and functions of University

provisions.chapter: PART II Establishment and functions of Botswana Open University
provisions.title: Seal of University
provisions.content:
5. Seal of University
(1) The seal of the University shall be such device as may be determined by the Council and shall be kept by the Vice-Chancellor.
(2) The affixing of the seal shall be authenticated by the Chairperson or Vice-Chairperson and the Vice-Chancellor or any other person authorised in that behalf by a resolution of the Council.
(3) Any contract or instrument which if entered into or executed by a person not being a body corporate would not be required to be under seal, may be entered into or executed without seal on behalf of the University by the Vice-Chancellor or any other person generally or specifically authorised by the Council in that behalf.

provisions.title: Principal officers of University
Chancellor
provisions.content:
7. Chancellor
(1) The Chancellor of the University shall be the President of the Republic of Botswana or such eminent person as may be appointed by the President.

definitions.definition: the University Council established under section 10
the Chairperson of the Council appointed under section 9
a mode of delivery of education to persons situated at a distance from the University, without such persons necessarily attending classes
designated places for providing support services to the students of the University
the Botswana College of Distance and Open Learning Act (Cap. 57:03)
the Statutes of the University enacted under section 32
